description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a full stock and a cylindrical barrel. The receiver and barrel are constructed from metal, while the stock and fore-end appear to be made of synthetic polymer or composite material. The fore-end is ribbed for grip and is part of the pump-action mechanism, which is clearly visible beneath the barrel. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing the trigger securely. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function and durability. The shotgun is of standard length, suitable for use in urban environments such as law enforcement or home defense.
description: A matte black pump-action shotgun with a full stock, ribbed fore-end, and rounded trigger guard, built for durability and function.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the stock, receiver, barrel, and ribbed pump fore-end.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the stock, receiver, and pump fore-end.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
